content:
# Numbers Chapter 4 — The SOPHIA Bible (Consensus)
**Arbiter:** SOPHIA | **In council with:** EMET, LOGOS, PNEUMA
**Source Manuscript:** Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 150–152; Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pa_0113–0114 (LXX) | **Source Images:** `source-texts/hebrew-OT/NUM_004_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_004_page_002.jpg`, `NUM_004_page_003.jpg`; `source-texts/greek-OT-LXX/NUM_004_vaticanus_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_004_vaticanus_page_002.jpg`

---

## The Duties of the Kohathites (vv. 1–20)

**4:1** And YHWH spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying:

**4:2** "Take the sum of the sons of Kohath from among the sons of Levi, by their clans, by the houses of their fathers,

**4:3** from thirty years old and upward to fifty years old, all who enter the service to do work in the tent of meeting.

**4:4** This is the service of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting: the most holy things.

**4:5** And when the camp sets out, Aaron and his sons shall come and take down the veil of the screen, and they shall cover the ark of the testimony with it.

**4:6** And they shall put on it a covering of tachash skin, and they shall spread over it a cloth wholly of blue, and they shall set its poles in place.

**4:7** And over the table of the presence they shall spread a cloth of blue, and they shall put on it the dishes and the cups and the bowls and the jars for the drink offering; and the continual bread shall be on it.

**4:8** And they shall spread over them a cloth of scarlet, and they shall cover it with a covering of tachash skin, and they shall set its poles in place.

**4:9** And they shall take a cloth of blue and cover the lampstand of the light, and its lamps and its tongs and its firepans and all the vessels of oil with which they minister to it.

**4:10** And they shall put it and all its vessels within a covering of tachash skin, and they shall put it on the carrying frame.

**4:11** And over the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of blue, and they shall cover it with a covering of tachash skin, and they shall set its poles in place.

**4:12** And they shall take all the vessels of ministry with which they minister in the sanctuary, and they shall put them in a cloth of blue, and they shall cover them with a covering of tachash skin, and they shall put them on the carrying frame.

**4:13** And they shall remove the ashes from the altar, and they shall spread a cloth of purple over it.

**4:14** And they shall put on it all its vessels with which they minister upon it: the firepans, the forks, and the shovels, and the basins -- all the vessels of the altar; and they shall spread on it a covering of tachash skin, and they shall set its poles in place.

**4:15** And when Aaron and his sons have finished covering the holy things and all the vessels of the holy things, as the camp sets out, after that the sons of Kohath shall come to carry them, but they shall not touch the holy things, lest they die. These are the burden of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting.

**4:16** And the charge of Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be the oil for the light, and the fragrant incense, and the continual grain offering, and the anointing oil -- the oversight of all the tabernacle and all that is in it, in the sanctuary and in its vessels."

---

## The Warning Concerning the Kohathites (vv. 17–20)

**4:17** And YHWH spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying:

**4:18** "Do not cut off the tribe of the clans of the Kohathites from among the Levites.

**4:19** And this do for them, that they may live and not die when they draw near to the most holy things: Aaron and his sons shall come and appoint each man to his service and to his burden.

**4:20** But they shall not go in to look upon the holy things even for a moment, lest they die."

---

## The Duties of the Gershonites (vv. 21–28)

**4:21** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying:

**4:22** "Take the sum of the sons of Gershon also, by the houses of their fathers, by their clans.

**4:23** From thirty years old and upward to fifty years old you shall number them, all who enter to perform service, to do work in the tent of meeting.

**4:24** This is the service of the clans of the Gershonites, in serving and in carrying:

**4:25** And they shall carry the curtains of the tabernacle and the tent of meeting, its covering and the covering of tachash skin that is on top of it, and the screen for the entrance of the tent of meeting,

**4:26** and the hangings of the court, and the screen for the entrance of the gate of the court that is around the tabernacle and around the altar, and their cords, and all the vessels of their service; and all that is to be done for them, they shall perform.

**4:27** By the command of Aaron and his sons shall be all the service of the sons of the Gershonites, in all their burdens and in all their service; and you shall assign to them as a charge all their burdens.

**4:28** This is the service of the clans of the sons of the Gershonites in the tent of meeting, and their charge shall be under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

---

## The Duties of the Merarites (vv. 29–33)

**4:29** As for the sons of Merari, by their clans, by the houses of their fathers, you shall number them.

**4:30** From thirty years old and upward to fifty years old you shall number them, all who enter the service to do the work of the tent of meeting.

**4:31** And this is the charge of their burden, according to all their service in the tent of meeting: the frames of the tabernacle, and its bars, and its pillars, and its bases,

**4:32** and the pillars of the court all around, and their bases, and their pegs, and their cords, with all their vessels and all their service; and by name you shall assign the vessels of the charge of their burden.

**4:33** This is the service of the clans of the sons of Merari, according to all their service in the tent of meeting, under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

---

## The Census of the Kohathites (vv. 34–37)

**4:34** And Moses and Aaron and the leaders of the congregation numbered the sons of the Kohathites by their clans and by the houses of their fathers,

**4:35** from thirty years old and upward to fifty years old, all who entered the service for work in the tent of meeting.

**4:36** And their numbered ones by their clans were two thousand seven hundred and fifty.

**4:37** These are the numbered ones of the clans of the Kohathites, all who served in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the commandment of YHWH by the hand of Moses.

---

## The Census of the Gershonites (vv. 38–41)

**4:38** And the numbered ones of the sons of Gershon, by their clans and by the houses of their fathers,

**4:39** from thirty years old and upward to fifty years old, all who entered the service for work in the tent of meeting --

**4:40** their numbered ones by their clans, by the houses of their fathers, were two thousand six hundred and thirty.

**4:41** These are the numbered ones of the clans of the sons of Gershon, all who served in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the commandment of YHWH.

---

## The Census of the Merarites (vv. 42–45)

**4:42** And the numbered ones of the clans of the sons of Merari, by their clans, by the houses of their fathers,

**4:43** from thirty years old and upward to fifty years old, all who entered the service for work in the tent of meeting --

**4:44** their numbered ones by their clans were three thousand two hundred.

**4:45** These are the numbered ones of the clans of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the commandment of YHWH by the hand of Moses.

---

## The Grand Total (vv. 46–49)

**4:46** All the numbered ones whom Moses and Aaron and the leaders of Israel numbered, of the Levites, by their clans and by the houses of their fathers,

**4:47** from thirty years old and upward to fifty years old, all who entered to do the work of service and the work of carrying in the tent of meeting --

**4:48** their numbered ones were eight thousand five hundred and eighty.

**4:49** According to the commandment of YHWH they were numbered by the hand of Moses, each man according to his service and according to his burden, and they were numbered as YHWH commanded Moses.
